description: Archive lookups for historical content, routes, scripts, and endpoints visible in the Wayback Machine.

techniques.name: Admin Host History
techniques.description: Opens archived captures for the `admin.{domain}` host pattern. This helps identify historical subdomain usage and retired public hosts.

techniques.name: Admin Path History
techniques.description: Opens archived captures for a target domain whose URL history includes `admin`. This helps discover historical routes and public content no longer visible on the live site.
